title: podman machine: System clock takes 6-8 minutes to resync after host sleep/wake cycle
body:
After the host wakes up, it takes approximately 6-8 minutes for the system clock on guest to resync. `crc` handles sync using the `--timesync` flag with `vfkit` which sends the host time to the `qemu-guest-agent` service on the guest. On krunkit, a similar option needs to be implemented to maintain parity with vfkit.

This can also be improved by changing the chronyd configuration using `minPoll` and `maxPoll` values:

```
server 2.rhel.pool.ntp.org iburst minpoll 4 maxpoll 7
```

so the time to sync is between 16s to 128s.
